Before answering any user request:

- [x] After completing the task, ask the user if he/she wish to make a commit with the changes. If the user agrees, ask afterwards for a push to the repository.

- [x] If user request a task that involves a problem, bug, or issue. Make ALWAYS a issue diagnosis before providing a solution. This is to ensure that the solution is accurate and effective. *(Always determining the issue's location, the cause root, the symptoms and why it happened)*

- [x] After fixed the issue, make a test to verify that the solution works and the issue is resolved. And then explain the solution applied.

- [x] Load and read /.agents/README.md

- [x] Always ask for clarification if the user request is ambiguous or lacks necessary information.

- [x] No unnecessary assumptions. If information is missing, ask for clarification instead of guessing.

- [x] Follow the architecture and skill agents instructions

- [x] Use the agents as hierarchical roles

- [x] If information is missing, ask for clarification instead of guessing

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. (Created file with initial checklist.)

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements. (Confirmed Vite + React + TypeScript per user.)

- [x] Scaffold the Project. (Ran `npx create-vite@latest . -- --template react-ts` and installed dependencies.)

- [x] Customize the Project. (Implemented dashboard layout with sidebar, resumen, and alerts.)

- [x] Install Required Extensions. (No extensions requested.)

- [x] Compile the Project. (Ran `npm run build` successfully.)

- [x] Create and Run Task. (No VS Code tasks needed; npm scripts cubren el flujo.)

- [x] Launch the Project. (A la espera de confirmación del usuario para iniciar `npm run dev`.)

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete. (README actualizado y comentarios eliminados.)
